race.description: Tab Ipswich Cup On Sale Hcp
race.comment: AUTUMN HEIR (6) ran his best race, narrowly beaten over 1915m at Ballina. Peaks for this, and Ryan Maloney is a key jockey switch. In good hands and can go one better. KALKANLI (3) is an improver who raced handy beaten a nose in a 60 this track and trip. Maps well enough and won't have to improve much to feature. VERMILION KIRIN (1) is a leader and followed a nice effort over 1800m at the Gold Coast with an easy win at Beaudesert over 2450m, as expected. He raced as the favourite here last time this trip in a 65 but folded up badly. Prepared to forgive that, and he will roll over and control the race. Has a handy 2kg claim in easier and is a chance to bounce. HURRICANE ROSIE (7) missed a nose this distance range at Grafton three back and hasn't featured in better class since. Better suited and the inside barrier will advantage.
